text:

Log:
  sysutils/mcelog: Updated to 146

  * Updated to 146
  * Added shebangfix

   - Fix malloc buffer overrun for unordered CPUs in sysfs
   - Fix overriding of DEBUG for make test
   - Change all test scripts to /bin/bash to handle Debian
   - Run all tests in make test
